items.name: MassBalanceMachine
items.description: Global machine learning glacier mass balance framework, capable of assimilating all sources of glaciological and remote sensing data

items.name: survalis
items.description: Interpretable Survival Machine Learning Framework

items.name: Thyroid_Disease_Classification_Feature_Engineering_Ensemble_Learning_XAI_LIME_SHAP
items.description: This project presents a leakage-safe explainable machine-learning framework for five-class thyroid disease classification using Bangladesh clinical data. It combines VT–MI-based feature selection, ensemble classifiers, and SHAP/LIME interpretability to support transparent, reliable, and clinically meaningful decision-making.

items.name: ANN-SVM-Hybrid-Modeling-Framework
items.description: This project is a professional, self-contained machine learning framework for regression modeling on the provided Excel dataset. It hybridizes an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) with a Support Vector Machine (SVM) by using the ANN as a nonlinear feature extractor and the SVM as the final regression model.

items.name: ai-enabled-electronic-health-record-framework
items.description: AI-enabled IoT healthcare monitoring system using Flask, MongoDB, ESP32 and Machine Learning.

items.name: oncology-recruitment-predictive-framework
items.description: A data engineering and machine learning framework analyzing 38,000+ oncology trial records to classify real-time recruitment risk using Python, Tableau Prep, and TabPy.

items.name: PhiFlow
items.description: A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning

items.name: production-ml-incident-remediation-governance
items.description: Investigated a production credit-scoring model degradation and designed a scalable MLOps governance framework with drift detection, fairness monitoring, explainable AI, automated retraining, and risk management controls for responsible machine learning.

items.name: Gradio-Framework
items.description: Gradio framework is an open-source Python framework that allows developers to rapidly build interactive web applications and user interfaces (UIs) for machine learning models, APIs

items.name: survival_analysis
items.description: A survival analysis framework for colorectal cancer research using Kaplan-Meier estimation, Cox modeling, PCA, and machine learning techniques to identify prognostic factors affecting disease-free survival.

items.name: customer_satisfaction
items.description: A research-oriented machine learning framework for customer satisfaction prediction using XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, Random Forest, SHAP explainability, hyperparameter optimization, and statistical validation.

items.description: A Unified and Interpretable Machine-learning Framework for Prediction of Loss-of-function Variants

items.name: ABX-XAI
items.description: Explainable machine learning framework for predicting antibiotic use among febrile under-five children using BDHS 2022 data.

items.name: Symbolic-RL-Fredholm-Solver
items.description: symbolic reinforcement learning framework for solving Fredholm integral equations using Deep Q-Networks and Scientific Machine Learning.

items.name: trace-synthesizer
items.description: A research framework for collecting, analyzing, and eventually synthesizing execution traces using machine learning.

items.name: SHM-ML
items.description: Machine learning framework for early damage detection in civil infrastructure using sparse sensing and SVD denoising.

items.name: leakage-aware-healthcare-ml
items.description: Leakage-aware and calibration-sensitive machine learning framework for reliable healthcare risk prediction.

items.name: LayerWise-QC
items.description: A prototype framework for in-situ quality control in laser powder bed fusion, combining optical tomography, powder-bed imaging, process parameters, and multimodal machine learning to estimate layer-wise defect risk.

items.name: toyota_stock
items.description: Forecasting Toyota Motor Corporation’s historical stock performance. This paper applies a dual-model analytical framework to Toyota’s daily closing prices from 1980 to 2026, combining a 46-year macroeconomic linear regression with a targeted logistic regression machine learning classifier.

items.name: federated-mnist
items.description: A complete, framework-free implementation of Federated Learning for privacy-preserving machine learning.

items.name: multifid-th
items.description: A general framework for building fast machine-learning surrogates of expensive physics simulations. Train models on simulation outputs, then plug the learned predictions back into the MOOSE-based porous medium flow solver to accelerate engineering workflows with better accuracy.

items.name: MiniML-Engine
items.description: MiniML is a lightweight Machine and Deep Learning framework dedicated to training neural networks in embedded systems, redefining conventional and heavyweight models into different methods that can be exported and executed on low-cost microcontrollers (Arduino, ESP32, STM32).

items.name: Explainable-AI-CKD-Prediction-SHAP
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Chronic Kidney Disease Prediction using SHAP-based Interpretability

items.name: poag-pgs-ml
items.description: Polygenic risk score (PGS) and machine learning framework for primary open-angle glaucoma prediction in African ancestry cohorts.

items.name: Corporate-Risk-Prediction-from-Financial-Statements-and-News
items.description: This project develops an AI-based framework for corporate risk prediction by integrating financial statement indicators with news sentiment analysis. Machine learning and natural language processing techniques are applied to identify risk patterns, improve prediction accuracy, and support business decision-making through data-driven insights.

items.name: healcare-data-preprocessing
items.description: This project establishes a scalable, enterprise-grade pipeline designed to transform raw, fragmented Electronic Health Records (EHR) into high-fidelity, predictive-ready datasets. By integrating advanced data sanitization protocols, this framework ensures clinical data integrity and optimizes inputs for downstream machine learning performance.

items.name: Boosting-Algorithm
items.description: Production-ready implementations and pedagogical guides for AdaBoost, Gradient Boosting, and XGBoost frameworks. Features comprehensive hyperparameter tuning, overfitting control mechanics, and comparative performance evaluation for tabular machine learning tasks.

items.name: Peru-BioRisk-AI
items.description: Open-source spatiotemporal machine learning framework for biological risk mapping in Peru.

items.name: ALF
items.description: An open-source active learning framework for training machine-learned interatomic potentials

items.name: perovskite_ML_model
items.description: this model predicts the bandgap using machine learning framework , and is developed by KNN algorithm.

items.name: Efficient-Heart-Disease-Prediction-project-using-Machine-Learning
items.description: Explainable Ensemble Machine Learning Framework for Heart Disease Prediction using Random Forest, XGBoost, SHAP, and Streamlit. This system predicts heart disease risk based on clinical parameters and provides interpretable AI-driven insights for healthcare decision support.

items.name: Symptom-Based-Tuberculosis-Detection-using-Machine-Learning
items.description: Developed an explainable machine learning framework for early tuberculosis risk prediction using clinical symptoms. Compared Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and XGBoost models, achieving 99.31% accuracy and 0.997 ROC-AUC. Applied SHAP explainability to identify clinically significant symptoms contributing to TB prediction.

items.description: Cross-domain machine learning framework for breast cancer histopathology and phishing website detection with explainability and robustness analysis.

items.description: This project proposes an intelligent peer-to-peer energy trading framework integrating IEEE distribution networks, machine learning, and blockchain technology. Machine learning predicts energy demand and generation, while blockchain enables secure, transparent, and decentralized energy transactions.

items.description: This is a github repo to build a a streaming, decision tree–based machine learning framework that also supports ensemble method from scratch

items.description: The cost of studying abroad is a key yet uncertain factor affecting students’ decisions. This project developed a machine learning framework to predict the total cost of international education using academic and economic variables.

items.name: Predicting-Market-Regimes-and-Volatility-Using-HMM-and-Hybrid-Machine-LearningTechniques
items.description: A hybrid HMM-LSTM framework that predicts market regimes and forecasts volatility. It pairs a Gaussian HMM for latent state detection with a 2-layer LSTM to eliminate state blindness. Tested on 2000–2026 data, it achieves 84% regime accuracy and a 53% reduction in RMSE over standard baselines

items.name: Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Soil-Classification-and-Nutrient-Aware-Crop-Recommendation

items.description: MedAgent is an AI-powered framework that combines machine learning, simulated IoT monitoring, and priority queue algorithms to predict emergency severity and optimize hospital queue management.

items.name: AgML
items.description: AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.

items.name: geospatial-supply-chain-optimization
items.description: This project presents a comprehensive, research-grade geospatial supply chain and logistics optimization framework that integrates Geographic Information Systems (GIS), graph-theoretic network analysis, operations research, and machine learning into a single reproducible pipeline.

items.name: crest-site
items.description: Project website for CREST, a hardware-in-the-loop neural architecture search framework for deployment-realistic embedded machine learning on resource-constrained microcontrollers.

items.description: A comprehensive Python framework for implementing and evaluating adversarial defense mechanisms against machine learning attacks. This project provides modern implementations of various adversarial attacks and defense strategies with interactive visualization and experiment tracking.

items.name: Predictive-Analytics-for-Sustainable-Fisheries
items.description: This repository features a comprehensive Python Jupyter notebook containing data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and machine learning models designed to serve as a pre-departure recommendation framework. By analyzing historical records of over 20,000 Sri Lankan offshore fishing trips (2022–2025) across 30+ operational variables.

items.name: ai-ml-engineering-portfolio
items.description: A collection of AI/ML engineering projects covering deep learning, MLOps, LLM frameworks, RAG applications, scalable pipelines, FastAPIs, Docker and production-focused machine learning systems.

items.name: healthcare-risk-prediction-ensemble-learning
items.description: This project develops an end-to-end machine learning framework for predicting heart attack risk using healthcare survey data. The solution goes beyond traditional classification by implementing a stacked ensemble architecture that combines multiple machine learning algorithms to improve predictive performance, robustness, and generalization.

items.name: Path-Loss-Prediction-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: Optimized stacking ensemble framework for path loss prediction in 5G mmWave wireless communication systems using Random Forest, SVR, and Gradient Boosting.

items.name: MicroTorch
items.description: MicroTorch is an educational deep learning framework designed to expose the internals of modern machine learning libraries by implementing every core component from first principles. Instead of relying on PyTorch or TensorFlow, MicroTorch builds automatic differentiation, backpropagation, neural network layers, and optimization directly in Python.

items.name: ASO_SOD1-SMN2_Prediction
items.description: A machine learning framework designed to predict the inhibitory efficacy of Antisense Oligonucleotides (ASOs) targeting SOD1 and SMN2

items.name: High-Risk-Lung-Cancer-Patient-Classification-Using-Machine-Learning-and-Deep-Learning
items.description: A comparative machine learning and deep learning framework for high-risk lung cancer patient classification, including data preprocessing, SMOTE balancing, feature selection, model evaluation, ROC-AUC analysis, and Streamlit GUI deployment.

items.name: CHHO-GSA-for-Voice-Based-Parkinson-s-Disease-Detection
items.description: CHHO-GSA is a hybrid feature selection framework for early Parkinson’s Disease detection using voice data. It combines Chaotic Harris Hawks Optimization (CHHO) and the Gravitational Search Algorithm (GSA) to select optimal acoustic features and improve classification performance using machine learning models.

items.name: TCAD-Inspired-FinFET-Modeling-Performance-Prediction-and-Power-Optimization-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: TCAD-inspired FinFET modeling and optimization framework using Machine Learning. Predicts drain current (Id), delay, and power consumption with Random Forest Regression, provides interactive design exploration, and performs PAL-based optimization for low-power device configurations.

items.name: OptimML-Framework
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework that automates model selection and hyperparameter optimization using genetic algorithms and exhaustive search methods. Features an interactive Streamlit dashboard for visualizing model performance, comparing algorithms, and exporting results to Excel.

items.name: network-attack-defence-framework
items.description: A two-phase machine learning framework featuring an adversarial attack fuzzer and defensive hardening loop evaluated against the CICIDS2017 dataset.

This project leverages advanced ensemble modeling to predict material properties, assess structural stability, and forecast commodity price fluctuations to facilitate data-driven inverse design.
